items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 8 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters」、「Insilico Medicine advances AI drug for IPF to Phase III trials」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：NVIDIA Vera exemplifies a new class of CPU, architected for the era of agents and being adopted by AI innovators including Perplexity; NVIDIA CPU roadmap continues with the NVIDIA Rosa CPU and its Rigel core.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
